_source: OmniClass Table 13 — Spaces by Function (publicly-available mirror, see _source/OmniClass-Table-13-source-notes.md for URL + edition + access date)
_note: Master index pointing to per-parent_category files under room-types/. One file per ACTUAL OmniClass Table 13 level-2 parent (16 total). Codes transcribed from publicly-available OmniClass Table 13 secondary mirror (https://pdfcoffee.com/omniclass-13-2012-05-16-pdf-free.html, accessed 2026-06-05), not the canonical OCCS PDF. Re-architected 2026-06-05 from a 7-category planner split (residential / commercial / institutional / industrial / transport / external / agricultural) after X.B.1 discovered T13 does NOT publish residential codes (T13 = Spaces by Function; residential entities live in T11 Construction Entities by Function, deferred to a future sprint). entry_count_target fields below are mirror-coverage estimates summing to ~250 total. Per-entry _verification_status field records sourcing. Future Sprint Y back-fill from canonical OCCS PDF (CSI license) will extend coverage and raise _verification_status to occs_verified.

_units.code_format: OmniClass 13-XX XX XX XX XX (5-segment 13-digit notation)

space_planning_types.description: Generic space planning units (rentable / usable / common / building gross area definitions)

void_areas.description: Vertical and horizontal voids (shafts, atria, light wells, double-height volumes)

wall_spaces.description: Wall thickness allowances and interstitial wall spaces

encroachment_spaces.description: Encroachments into adjacent spaces (columns, projections, balconies)

parking_spaces.description: Vehicle parking (surface, structured, valet, drop-off, EV, accessible)

facility_service_spaces.description: Mechanical / electrical / janitorial / loading / waste / IT service rooms

circulation_spaces.description: Corridors, lobbies, stairs, elevator lobbies, vestibules

education_and_training_spaces.description: Classrooms, lecture halls, labs, libraries-as-instructional, training rooms

recreation_spaces.description: Gymnasiums, pools, courts, fitness, locker rooms, recreational

government_spaces.description: Courtrooms, council chambers, detention, civic offices

artistic_spaces.description: Theatres, concert halls, studios, rehearsal, backstage

museum_spaces.description: Galleries, exhibition halls, collections storage, conservation

library_spaces.description: Reading rooms, stacks, archives, study carrels

environmentally_controlled_spaces.description: Cleanrooms, cold storage, anechoic, EMI-shielded, vivariums

healthcare_spaces.description: Operating theatres, patient rooms, imaging, treatment, clinical support
